questions.question: Explain the main advantages of using the chalk and talk method over PowerPoint presentation for teaching Eigenvalues and EigenVectors in Linear Algebra, and provide an example of how to effectively use both methods.
questions.hint: Provide at least two advantages and a brief example of each method

questions.question: State the key characteristics of a good PowerPoint presentation for teaching Eigenvalues and EigenVectors in Linear Algebra, and give an example of how to use diagrams effectively in a PowerPoint presentation.
questions.hint: Focus on content, clarity, and visual aids

questions.question: Describe the steps involved in creating an effective PowerPoint presentation for teaching Eigenvalues and EigenVectors in Linear Algebra, and provide an example of how to use transitions and animations judiciously.
questions.hint: Focus on content, design, and technical aspects
